summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed, 0 failed. HIP RoPE kernel (rope_v2.hip) achieves max_err=0.000000 vs reference for both head_dim=128 and 256. Engine wired to use HIP RoPE replacing assembly rope.s.
